sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b:
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if n['pixels'] > 5:
            print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Check the overlap region on RIGHT side
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRight side overlap (rows 45-55, cols 33-60):")
for i in range(45, min(56, len(lines))):
    print(f"  {i}: {lines[i][33:61]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
